_comment: TYRAX node inbound — VLESS + REALITY + XHTTP (Profile A). Paste into 3x-ui 'Add Inbound' (JSON view) or recreate the fields in the form. MUST stay identical to what the backend generates in pkg/vpnconfig/vless.go and to the DB nodes row. Replace <PRIVATE_KEY> and <SHORT_ID> with the values printed by deploy-node.sh. The 'clients' list starts with one bootstrap client; the TYRAX backend adds per-device UUIDs via the 3x-ui panel API.
